narrative:
Amboy / Metamora (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,262 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
